heroHeadline: Artemis II En Route to the Moon — First Crewed Deep Space Mission Since Apollo 17
heroSubtitle: SLS/Orion launched April 1 at 6:35 p.m. EDT; crew (Wiseman, Glover, Koch, Hansen) on 10-day lunar flyby. First humans beyond LEO in 53 years. Mission Day 2 underway.
footerNote: Data sourced from NASA.gov, OIG Reports, SpaceNews, Ars Technica, Congressional appropriations. Tier 1: NASA/ESA/Official. Tier 2: SpaceNews/Ars Technica/Reuters. Tier 3: Planetary Society/AIAA.
